challenge.title: Korak 10
challenge.description:
Kako vidite, Python je proizvelo TypeError: can only concatenate str (not "int") to str. Ovo se dešava zato što Python nije dozvolilo kombinovanje teksta (sekvenca slova) i brojeva (pun broj) direktno.

Da biste ovo ispravili, morate prvo promeniti broj u niz slova koristeći funkciju str(), koja vraća verziju niza slova objekta:

my_num = str(42)
print(type(my_num)) # <class 'str'>

Ispraviti mapiranje za employee_info promenom employee_age u niz znakova koristeći str(employee_age).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + employee_age

tests.text: Trebalo bi da promenite dodelu vrednosti vašeg parametra employee_info tako što ćete promeniti employee_age u niz karaktera koristeći str(employee_age).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)
experience_years = 5
experience_info = 'Experience: ' + str(experience_years) + ' years'
print(experience_info)
position = 'Data Analyst'
salary = 75000
employee_card = f'Employee: {full_name} | Age: {employee_age} | Position: {position} | Salary: ${salary}'
print(employee_card)
employee_code = 'DEV-2026-JD-001'
department = employee_code[0:3]
print(department)
year_code = employee_code[4:8]
initials = employee_code[9:11]
print(year_code)
print(initials)
last_three = employee_code[-3:]
print(last_three)
